message:
test(validation-pipeline, resize-sla): add 19 unit tests

- validation_pipeline.rs: 10 tests for config defaults, Default impl,
  all_stats, invalid id handling, zero-sum failure_prob/variance, score
  with cost floor, empty summary, sequential id registration
- resize_sla.rs: 9 tests for config defaults, last_alert, clear_logs,
  threshold_ms, is_active, calibration_count, alerter_stats, sampling
  summary/logs without VOI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
